Critique:
Step 1 is incorrect. Using f_select_column(*) is a no-op that retains all columns and does not focus on the relevant "destinations" column nor help identify the last listed destination. A more appropriate approach would be f_select_column(destinations) followed by selecting the last row (route 16) and extracting the final destination entry ("bus terminal") from that cell.
